## Description

Please describe what changed in this Pull Request and why this change is necessary.

### Checklist

Please verify that your contribution meets these requirements before opening the PR:
- [ ] My code follows the code style of this project.
- [ ] I have updated the documentation to reflect these changes if needed.
- [ ] I have verified that all existing and new tests pass.
- [ ] No emojis have been added to any markdown files.

### Screenshots

If this PR affects visual outputs (such as interactive console menus or diagnostics lists), please add screenshots of before and after states.
